title: MTR Shanghai Wetro Addon
description: An addition mod for Minecraft Transit Railway, provide many decorations of metro in Shanghai.
body:
# Introduction 介绍

This is an addon for *Minecraft Transit Railway* mod, which offers many real decorations for it.

这是一个为*Minecraft Transit Railway*模组提供大量真实装饰设施的模组。

Its aim is to create a special experience of metro systems in China Mainland, so as to make your buildings more colorful and modern.

其旨在高度还原中国大陆地区独特的地铁系统风格，同时使得虚拟地铁建筑更加现代，更加多姿多彩。

Blocks here contain such as **More walls and floor, new PSD Top style, high-poly ticket barrier, longer signs**, etc. Many of their textures are taken in reality.

新增加的方块包括更多种类的墙和地板，独立的屏蔽门吊板风格，高精闸机，更长的指示牌等。其中有很多贴图是实拍的。

# Dependencies 依赖

Either *Fabric* or *Forge* modloader is supported (no Quilt now). If you're using Fabric, make sure you installed *Fabric API*.

*Fabric*和*Forge*模组加载器都在支持范围内。如果在Fabric上使用，确保你正确安装了*Fabric API*。

*Minecraft Transit Railway* ***3.X*** is necessary for it as well. **NO 4.X SUPPORT TILL NOW.**

另外，*Minecraft Transit Railway* ***3.X***版本必须安装。 **4.X版本暂时没有支持。**

> According to reports, using Optifine with this mod will cause many problems, so please avoid installing it.
> 根据用户反馈，同时使用 Optifine 会造成很多渲染问题，故请不要使用。

# *Fun*: Where did name from?  为何叫这个名字？

"Wetro" is a wrong spelling of **"Metro"**. In reality, The Shanghai Metro Company (so-called Shentong) sometimes pastes their logo wrongly in a reversed direction, so the "SM" becomes "SW". 

"Wetro" 是 "Metro" （地铁）的错误拼写。现实中，上海申通地铁集团有时把他们自己的SM标贴反了，看上去就是SW标。

Among railfans and busfans, it's also called "Sunwin Metro" (Sunwin is a local bus manufacturing company). But for there, it's just a joke for fun.

在各路爱好者间，这种贴错的标志也被称作申沃地铁（申沃是上海本地的公交车厂商）。不过在这里没那么多，只是为了图一乐罢了。
